data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm that all required fields are explicitly defined in the form builder. The exploratory step instruction specifically calls for validation of required vs optional fields, but the linked use case does not provide sufficient detail on the field types or their required status. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary information to validate the requirement is missing.
gaps: Missing explicit confirmation of all required field types in the form builder.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
